content: The @openai/codex-sdk is a thin TypeScript wrapper around the `codex exec --experimental-json` subprocess. When no OPENAI_API_KEY is set, `new Codex()` automatically reads OAuth tokens from ~/.codex/auth.json created by `codex login`. Structured output via outputSchema works on the ChatGPT subscription tier. Do NOT propose building a separate CLI adapter, provider_mode config, or subprocess management — the SDK already handles all of it.
context: Original roadmap_1.1.md Phase 3 planned a CLI adapter with provider_mode: 'sdk' | 'cli'. A 2026-02-20 spike proved the SDK already spawns the CLI internally, so Phase 3 became documentation-only (README rewrite for the free-tier path). This lesson exists specifically to stop future contributors re-proposing the cut work. See docs/roadmap_1.1.md:105-119 and handover 2026-02-20-readme-and-doc-cleanup.
title: @openai/codex-sdk spawns the CLI — do not build a separate adapter
